prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A system enters an IRQ storm and stops making forward progress. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) dispatch hard IRQ handling, (2) detect interrupt flood or stuck-interrupt conditions, and (3) disable, throttle, or log the problematic IRQ line.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the linux-kernel fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A system enters an IRQ storm and stops making forward progress. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) dispatch hard IRQ handling, (2) detect interrupt flood or stuck-interrupt conditions, and (3) disable, throttle, or log the problematic IRQ line.

params.search_pattern: IRQ OR interrupt storm OR disable_irq OR flood
